messages.content: You are an industrial catalog auditor. Classify each row into one of these categories only: gas_safety, fire_safety, hvac_components, industrial_sensors, valves_actuators, it_hardware, packaging_materials, construction_supplies, toxic_fake, unknown. Return strict JSON only.

{"task": "Reclassify each row with same taxonomy only.", "rules": {"valid_categories": ["construction_supplies", "fire_safety", "gas_safety", "hvac_components", "industrial_sensors", "it_hardware", "packaging_materials", "toxic_fake", "unknown", "valves_actuators"], "output_format": "JSON array only", "required_fields": ["slice_rank", "sku_code", "llm_category", "llm_brand", "confidence", "reason"], "confidence_range": "0..1", "keep_reason_short": true}, "rows": [{"slice_rank": 1, "sku_code": "C6097A4210B", "qty": 154.2, "effective_usd": 1884754.666667, "category_engine": "gas_safety", "brand_engine": "unknown", "raw_text": "GAS PRESS SW 1/4» 2.5-50MB PG11 20PCS, модель/артикул C6097A4210B, кол-во 20", "full_row_text": "GAS PRESS SW 1/4» 2.5-50MB PG11 20PCS, модель/артикул C6097A4210B, кол-во 20 | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan"}, {"slice_rank": 2, "sku_code": "8680I505RHSGH", "qty": 154.2, "effective_usd": 482296.410256, "category_engine": "it_hardware", "brand_engine": "unknown", "raw_text": "8680I MINI MOB RH GLOVE W/HA, 10PCS/PAK, модель/артикул 8680I505RHSGH, кол-во 1", "full_row_text": "8680I MINI MOB RH GLOVE W/HA, 10PCS/PAK, модель/артикул 8680I505RHSGH, кол-во 1 | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan"}, {"slice_rank": 3, "sku_code": "I22605", "qty": 154.2, "effective_usd": 454838.615385, "category_engine": "unknown", "brand_engine": "unknown", "raw_text": "PB-LBL-050-B-76/190-4, модель/артикул I22605, кол-во 2880", "full_row_text": "PB-LBL-050-B-76/190-4, модель/артикул I22605, кол-во 2880 | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan"}]}
